name: MILLS MUSIC TRUST
business: Mills Music Trust is a trust that receives quarterly payments of a deferred contingent purchase price obligation from EMI Mills Music Inc., based on royalty income from a music catalog of over 12,000 songs. The trust distributes these payments to unit holders after expenses. It does not own the catalog or engage in any business activities.

exposures.sentence: The Trust receives quarterly payments of the Contingent Portion from EMI and distributes the amounts it receives to the registered owners of Trust certificates (the Unit Holders) representing interests in the Trust (the Trust Units), after payment of, or withholdings in connection with, expenses and liabilities of the Trust.
